title: orobanche loricata var. picridis
intro: Orobanche loricata var. picridis, also known as Picridi Orobanche, is a species of parasitic flowering plant belonging to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Orobanche loricata var. picridis include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, it can be consumed as a decoction or tea, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
